text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Bright having dazzled so brilliantly
during these three years in the Twinkle Series, the
Mejiro family's fortunes are as glorious as they've
ever been.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling she's on track to become an
unrivaled runner in the future. At least, that's how
it seems...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Reality proves me wrong, however...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright was juuust short! She cut in from the
inside but couldn't quite make it, and placed
second!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's definitely not lacking in skill! But that
underdog took her by storm!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: What's going on with Mejiro Bright?! She came fifth today! That's fifth.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Victory has eluded her on the grand stage! But
maybe it was never on the cards at all?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright wins a few races but loses by an inch
many more times. Some onlookers even suggest
that she's simply lacking in innate ability...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'm truly sorry, Trainer... Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Where exactly did I go wrong, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she loses races, it's plain to see why.
There's no doubt about it...
choice_data_list: Races are starting off faster now.
Races are starting off faster now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Faster, you say?
choice_data_list:
Yes. I've noticed that lately, the pack moves at
a high pace throughout each race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's biggest advantage is her ability to
unleash a burst of speed during the final stretch in
long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with her competition in medium races
powering ahead early and mid-race, it's tough for
Bright to close the gap in the end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, it's frustrating to see. If Mejiro Bright
were running in races she was better suited to,
she'd be on a winning streak right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The modern Twinkle Series just isn't the ideal
place for her. It's such a shame.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If recent trends truly are to blame, then I... Hmm,
yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I needn't be especially concerned. That's what it
means, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee. What a relief! I feel slightly better now.
choice_data_list: ...A relief? Don't these losses bother you?
...A relief? Don't these losses bother you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But of course they bother me... And I do believe
that we'll need to come up with a plan. That
said...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I won't be adapting to this trend, nor changing
who I am. And that's because...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
These trends belong to this era alone, and there's
no telling how things will be ten to twenty years
from now, is there?
choice_data_list: Ten to... twenty years from now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. The future I have in mind is a very long
time from now and won't arrive until long after
I've retired from racing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
In the event that an era perfectly suited to my
running style should come to pass...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family would be in a terrible bind
without my running experience to draw from,
wouldn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What ought to change will change, and that
which should be preserved will be. If that course
cannot be stayed amidst the trends...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Then it will be a very long time indeed before the
Mejiro family finds success in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Things are fine just as they are, Trainer. Yes...
After all, the present isn't the be-all and end-all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiros are here, I'm here... The times are
secondary...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I haven't lost sight of it, you know. Even on these
days of defeat, that far-off peak remains in sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stands motionless. This is the wider
perspective of the Mejiro family. No, actually, it's
Mejiro Bright's own vision.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right. What really matters... is that I
trust in Mejiro Bright's strength, hone it, and pass
it on to the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, she's no ordinary Umamusume. The goal
she's aiming for is set far further away than most
racers could dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright is forging down the marathon track
of history itself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's continue our pursuit as we have been,
Trainer, without ever losing heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We'll be all right even if we do fall short now. The
current Mejiro generation is working ever so hard,
you see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I expect the winners of today will have their share
of smiles. That's a wonderful thing in its own right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But there is something else that's faaar more
wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
100 years from now, however drastically the
Twinkle Series has changed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When that time comes, first place will be home...
to us.
